Container.Name: ai-usage-tracker
Container.Overview: Central aggregation server for AI usage telemetry. Collectors forward compact usage events to this server, and OpenRouter Broadcast can send OTLP traces to /v1/traces when enabled. The server stores usage in SQLite and exposes token reports plus collector-token administration.

Config.Name: Web UI / API Port
Config.Description: Host port for the aggregation server web UI, admin UI, reports, collector ingestion API, and optional OpenRouter Broadcast /v1/traces endpoint. The container listens on 8318/tcp.

Config.Name: Persistent Data
Config.Description: Stores the server SQLite database, WAL files, and persistent server.toml config.
